title: Goniopteris monosora

Traditionally, Goniopteris monospora has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Goniopteris monospora is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations.
taxonomy: Goniopteris monosora is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a group of ferns.
